title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 108.100 - Bond registry, contents (county)
text:
108.100.  Bond registry, contents (county). — All bonds issued under sections 108.010 to 108.110 shall be registered in the office of the county clerk, in a book kept for that purpose, which registry shall show the number, date, face amount, interest rate, date of sale, name of purchaser, maturity date, and the amount for which the bond was sold.
(RSMo 1939 § 3299, A.L. 1945 p. 597 § 3300a) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2912; 1919 § 1060; 1909 § 1268
